title: Bridge Essay: The respiratory modulation of interoception.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.

**The respiratory modulation of interoception.**. J Neurophysiol.. PMID: 35294271. DOI: 10.1152/jn.00027.2022. In arecent article published in The Journal of Neurophysiology titled "Sensitivity to changes in rate of heartbeats as ameasure of interoceptive ability," Larsson et al. introduce anew method to evaluate the interoceptive ability and report asurprising tendency in humans to perceive fewer heartbeats during spontaneous increases in resting heart rate.
